---
name: Security hardening
about: Propose a hardening improvement for test framework, CI, runtime handling, or artifacts
labels: [security]
---

## Note
English is preferred, but German is also accepted.

## Affected area
Identify the affected area (tests, rules, runners, CI, Docker, reporting, docs, or workflows).

## Risk or threat scenario
Describe the security risk, attack scenario, or misuse path.

## Proposed mitigation
Describe the hardening measure and implementation idea.

## Expected security improvement
Explain the expected risk reduction.

## Possible breaking changes
List compatibility or behavioral changes that may occur.

## Testing considerations
Describe how to validate the mitigation and avoid regressions.
